description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a broad, ornate blade featuring intricate swirling engravings on both sides. The blade is made of a metallic material with a slightly aged, greenish-gray patina, giving it an antique or fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is long, slightly curved, and appears to be constructed from dark wood with a wrapped grip section, possibly leather, for improved handling. The lower end of the handle is capped with a metallic fitting, matching the blade's color and style. The axe head is securely mounted to the handle, and the overall design suggests both decorative and functional intent. The object is robust and visually striking, suitable for display or practical use in an urban or themed environment.
description: A decorative, single-bladed axe with ornate engravings on a metallic blade and a curved, dark wooden handle with a wrapped grip.
description_view_0: The axe is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: The ornate blade with swirling engravings and the curved handle with a wrapped grip are clearly visible from this side.
description_view_2: The axe is again seen edge-on, similar to view 0, highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the ornate blade is visible, mirroring the engravings and handle curvature seen in view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a wrapped grip section, oval cross-section, and metallic end cap.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a crescent edge, ornate swirling engravings, and a short beard; symmetrical on both sides.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible integration between blade and handle.
